title: Raid on Nomad City

A '''raid''' was launched on [[Nomad City]] by the forces of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to prepare for his attack on [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]]. In order to capture the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ships stationed in the shipyards at Sluis Van, Thrawn needed [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]]. [[Thrawn's confederation]] attacked [[Nomad City]], a mining colony located on [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]] and ran by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] happened to be in the system, visiting Calrissian in hopes he could hide Leia from Imperial assassins. They helped fight in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], but Thrawn still managed to capture fifty-one mole miners, more than half of Nomad City's complement. During the battle, Skywalker first came into contact with the mad [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Joruus C'baoth]], who telepathically reached out to Skywalker.
